positive: A stylized, maximalist pattern featuring whimsical forest creatures and geometric flora, designed as a seamless repeating print for apparel. Main subjects include highly detailed, abstract raccoons, deep forest moths, and glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. The composition must be central and highly symmetrical, utilizing a strong, high-contrast silhouette style with deep emerald greens, burnt ochre, and glowing turquoise accents. Clean line art meets vintage mid-century illustration aesthetic, suitable for screen printing. Flat depth, perfect for t-shirts and tote bags. Focus on graphic clarity and punchy color blocking. Studio lighting, vector illustration quality.
negative: low resolution, blurry, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, disfigured, duplicate, extra limbs, messy composition, noise, grain
